# discord_role (Resource)

Manages a Discord role within a server.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the role (1-100 characters).
- `server_id` (String) The ID of the server (guild) the role belongs to.

### Optional

- `color` (Number) The color of the role (RGB integer value, 0 for no color).
- `hoist` (Boolean) Whether the role is displayed separately in the sidebar.
- `mentionable` (Boolean) Whether the role is mentionable by everyone.
- `permissions` (String) The permission bitset string for the role.
- `position` (Number) The position of the role in the role list (0 is lowest).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the role.
- `last_updated` (String)
